step_title: community ingress probe deploy and proof
summary: 已完成 server ingress proof：仅同步 community.py 并重启 api 后，admin bearer only 的单次 canonical trusted broadcast 在 community.py:428 提前因 MessageCreate.resolved_author_kind 缺失而 500，community_post_message_ingress_probe 未落日志；首个 system/context_block 丢失层判定为 MessageCreate/model_dump。
blocker: MessageCreate/model_dump：这次 canonical trusted broadcast 在进入 community_post_message_ingress_probe 之前就于 community.py:428 访问 payload.resolved_author_kind 失败，返回 internal_error，因此未进入后续 branch/persistence。
tests: GET /api/v1/health returned success=true,message=ok,data.status=ok after restarting only agent-community-api-1.
community.py bind-source/container SHA256 changed to local 4BF0B6BEF53BA55188438E7CF019B46D6B13C7A08DB4F77BE664D139FBB1FF1F.
Single canonical trusted system broadcast with admin bearer only returned 500 internal_error.
No community_post_message_ingress_probe log was emitted because execution failed earlier at community.py:428 on payload.resolved_author_kind.
